question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?
question.description: Converts missing context into a concrete manager support plan.

answer: If I know exactly what ownership I should take this month, I can contribute with more confidence.

assessment.note: Names missing ownership clarity as the support he lacks right now; that is a mild negative signal on clarity and growth.

new_queue.label: Next-step landing
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: The runbook helped, but some practical handoff details only show up during live incidents.
A short weekly architecture review with someone senior would help me calibrate faster.
I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
A short weekly architecture review with someone senior would help me calibrate faster.
I can trace most request paths now, though I still miss historical context behind certain tradeoffs.
I have not been fully clear on who is on point for each domain when priorities conflict.
I am trying not to interrupt people, so sometimes I keep questions in a notes doc instead of asking.
I would benefit from a clearer guide for what to escalate quickly versus what to batch.
